message: Fix derailment/gale events to randomly drop loads and zero movement budget
Add 15% long-route demand cards and backlog discard pile reshuffle
Add manual zoom in/out buttons to bottom-left of map
Fix lobby player colors to match rail line colors
Fix 5 AI paralysis bugs: stale targets, skippable actions, path walking
Fix AI discontinuous track building and stuck deploy loop
Phase 3 Steps 2-3: Add aiState and implement Easy AI core strategy module
Phase 3 Step 1: Extract action handlers into server/ai-actions.js
Add solo mode Phase 2: AI turn loop with placeholder actions
